---
title: "Funding"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

<style>
.funding-intro {
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  max-width: 900px;
}

.funding-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 0.9rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.funding-card {
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 0.9rem 1rem;
  background: #fff;
  height: 100%;
}

.funding-card h3 {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.25;
}

.funding-card p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
  color: #555;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
}

.funding-card a {
  text-decoration: none;
}

.funding-note {
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #555;
  max-width: 900px;
}
</style>

::: {.funding-intro}
Research in the Girke lab has been supported by public funding agencies that advance computational biology, genome biology, chemical genomics, aging research, plant biology, and research cyberinfrastructure.
:::

## Funding Agencies

::: {.funding-grid}

::: {.funding-card}
### [National Science Foundation](https://www.nsf.gov/)
Support for research, training, and cyberinfrastructure in the biological, computational, and data sciences.
:::

::: {.funding-card}
### [National Institutes of Health](https://www.nih.gov/)
Support for biomedical research, data-intensive biology, and translational discovery.
:::

::: {.funding-card}
### [National Institute on Aging](https://www.nia.nih.gov/)
Support for aging research, geroscience, and computational approaches to longevity-related biology.
:::

::: {.funding-card}
### [U.S. Department of Agriculture](https://www.usda.gov/)
Support for agricultural research, plant biology, and data-driven discovery relevant to food and crop systems.
:::

:::

::: {.funding-note}
Specific projects and publications should acknowledge the relevant award numbers and agency support in accordance with sponsor guidance.
:::
